name: Oil-Dri Corp of America
summary: Oil-Dri Corporation of America is a leader in developing, manufacturing, and marketing sorbent products derived from hydrated aluminosilicate minerals including calcium bentonite, attapulgite, and diatomaceous shale. Principal products include branded and private label cat litter (Cat's Pride, Jonny Cat), industrial floor absorbents, fluids purification bleaching clays, agricultural chemical carriers (Agsorb, Verge), and animal health and nutrition solutions (Amlan brand). The company operates two segments: Retail and Wholesale Products Group and Business to Business Products Group, with operations in the U.S. and internationally.

products.name: Cat's Pride
products.description: Branded scoopable and non-clumping clay-based cat litter, including lightweight and antibacterial variants.

products.name: Jonny Cat
products.description: Branded scoopable and non-clumping cat litter and litter box liners.

products.name: Ultra, Litter Pearls, Cat's Pride Crystal
products.description: Silica gel-based crystal cat litter acquired via Ultra Pet, sold domestically and internationally.

products.name: Oil-Dri Floor Absorbents
products.description: Clay-based branded and private label floor absorbents for industrial, automotive, and home use.

products.name: Oil-Dri Synthetic Sorbents
products.description: Polypropylene and recycled material sorbent pads, rolls, socks, booms, and spill kits for industrial and marine cleanup.

products.name: Pure-Flo, Perform, Select, Metal-X, Metal-Z, Ultra-Clear
products.description: Adsorbent bleaching and purification clays for edible oils, renewable diesel, biodiesel, and jet fuel processing.

products.name: Agsorb, Verge, Flo-Fre
products.description: Mineral-based granules and powders used as agricultural and horticultural chemical carriers and drying agents.

products.name: Amlan (Calibrin, Varium, NeoPrime, Sorbiam, Ambio P, Ambio S)
products.description: Animal health and nutrition products for swine, poultry, and dairy cattle livestock production.

products.name: Pros Choice Sports Field Products
products.description: Branded soil conditioners, packing clay, and drying agents for baseball, football, cricket, and soccer fields.

products.name: KatKit
products.description: Non-clumping cat litter in a pre-packaged, disposable tray under the Cat's Pride brand.

products.name: Oil-Dri Synthetic Sorbents
products.description: Polypropylene and recycled material sorbent pads, rolls, socks, booms, and spill kits for industrial/marine use.

products.name: Pure-Flo / Perform
products.description: Bleaching clays for edible oil processors to remove metals, chlorophyll, and color bodies.

products.name: Select
products.description: Adsorbent used in pre-treatment of vegetable and biodiesel oil processing to remove metals and soap.

products.name: Metal-X / Metal-Z
products.description: Highly efficient adsorbents for the renewable diesel market.

products.name: Ultra-Clear
products.description: Purification and filtration medium for jet fuel and petroleum-based products.

products.name: Agsorb
products.description: Mineral-based agricultural and horticultural carrier and drying agent for lawn, garden, and row crops.

products.name: Verge
products.description: Spherical engineered granule carrier and drying agent with low dust for agricultural applications.

products.name: Flo-Fre
products.description: Highly absorbent microgranule used as a flowability aid for grain processors.

products.name: Amlan (Calibrin, Varium, NeoPrime, Sorbiam, Ambio P, Ambio S)
products.description: Animal health and nutrition products for swine, poultry, and dairy cattle livestock production.

products.name: Pros Choice Sports Field Products
